action_choice_hints: Whether the action cell is in the same row or column as a key token of interest
Whether the action cell is adjacent to a token with a special role
Whether the action cell is the nearest empty cell to a target token along a cardinal direction
Whether there exists an uninterrupted path from a token of interest to the action cell
Whether the action cell is within a contiguous segment of empty cells
Whether the action cell is blocked by an obstacle before reaching a boundary in a given direction
Whether the action cell is the first available cell in a direction from a token of interest
Whether the action cell is within a certain distance (e.g., within 1 or 2 steps) from a token of interest
Whether the action cell is in a region (e.g., top or bottom band) containing a specific token role
Whether all cells between a token of interest and the action cell are empty
Whether the action cell is part of a run of empty cells of a minimum length
Whether the action cell is aligned with multiple tokens of interest along a row or column
Whether the action cell is at the boundary of the grid
Whether the action cell is the only available cell in a local neighborhood
Whether the action cell is in a column or row with the highest density of a specific token role
transition_hints: Selecting a cell containing a movable token causes that token to become highlighted
Selecting an empty cell adjacent to a highlighted token causes the highlighted token to move to that cell
After a token moves, its previous cell becomes empty
Highlighting is removed from a token after it moves
Only one token can be highlighted at a time
Selecting a non-movable or blocked cell results in no change
A highlighted token can only move to empty cells
Tokens with special roles cannot move through obstacles or other tokens
The environment updates deterministically based on the selected cell and current highlights
feature_family_hints: Directional scan features: to detect the first token of a given role along a row or column
Adjacency features: to check if a cell is adjacent to a token of interest
Contiguity/run features: to measure the length of empty or occupied segments
Path-clearance features: to determine if a path between two cells is unobstructed
Distance features: to compute the number of steps between a cell and a token of interest
Boundary features: to check if a cell is at the edge of the grid
Region-based features: to aggregate information over bands or quadrants of the grid
Highlight status features: to indicate whether a token is currently highlighted
Uniqueness features: to detect if a cell is the only available option in a neighborhood
Density features: to count the number of tokens of a given role in a row or column
Alignment features: to check if multiple tokens of interest are aligned along a direction
Obstacle-blocking features: to determine if movement is blocked before reaching a boundary
Local neighborhood features: to summarize the configuration around a candidate cell
Role-transition features: to capture changes in token roles after an action
Global context features: to encode the overall distribution of token roles on the grid

diversity_requirements: Include both local (adjacency, neighborhood) and global (row/column, region) templates
Require at least one template that combines path-clearance with distance or alignment
placeholder_usage_limits: Limit templates to at most two free coordinate placeholders per feature
Restrict directional scans to a maximum of three directions per template
avoidances: Avoid templates that only check for the presence of a token at a fixed coordinate
Avoid templates that duplicate the same predicate with only minor variations in distance
